productDisplayName: United Colors Of Benetton Men Latnam Black Casual Shoes
description: If you thought that casual shoes are just casual, think again! These shoes from the United Colours of Benetton are casual with a funky, hip twist. Super light and drop-dead gorgeous, they have an air chamber which gives you more cushioing and comfort. Hang out with the cool gang in them, and you will easily become the coolest member of the group! Look stylish and wow in these comfortable shoes all day long. Upper Synthetic upper with nubuck and synthetic leather overlays for added durability, structure and style Mid-cut design for ankle support and lateral stability Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Lushly padded tongue and well-cushioned collar for in-step comfort Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight responsive cushioning and shock absorption Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Air cushioning in the heel for better shock absorption Outsole TPR outsole for better shock absorption and durability Waffle-pattern grip for excellent traction Casing around the air cushioing chamber shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash Do not store in direct sunlight
